name: TDI Sharkfin Reversal
description: Original TradingView TDI white-label sharkfin strategy. Trades only the white BUY and white SELL label signals from the uploaded Pine script.
entry: BUY when the original white BUY label appears: fastMA[2] < 32, fastMA[1] > fastMA[2], fastMA > fastMA[1], and fastMA < 32. SELL / reduce when the original white SELL label appears: fastMA[2] > 68, fastMA[1] < fastMA[2], fastMA < fastMA[1], and fastMA > 68.
confirmation: Confirmed only by the original white label signal itself. The turquoise wait crosses, TDI Bollinger-band pierces, and signal-line 68/32 exits are ignored.
risk_governor: Spot trading only. White BUY converts USDT to the selected token. White SELL converts the selected token back to USDT only if the wallet already holds that token. No synthetic shorts. Max open trade: 1.

buy_signal.name: tdi_white_buy_signal
buy_signal.logic: fastMA[2] < 32 and fastMA[1] > fastMA[2] and fastMA > fastMA[1] and fastMA < 32

sell_signal.name: tdi_white_sell_signal
sell_signal.logic: fastMA[2] > 68 and fastMA[1] < fastMA[2] and fastMA < fastMA[1] and fastMA > 68

ignored_signals: signal-line 68 exit without a white SELL label
signal-line 32 exit without a white BUY label
spot_trading_rule: White BUY opens/reloads selected-token exposure from USDT. White SELL closes/reduces selected-token exposure to USDT only when a token balance exists.
